body.title: G-HB3: PROC_RESP_WHO_AM_I bypasses _build_think_context
body.result: Removed 'who am i' from tier.0 _name_words and thalamus _MEMORY_LOOKUP_PHRASES. Output complexity now 'medium' → context_inject runs, SELF_CONTEXT pushed to TWM, falls through to LLM, _build_think_context + D072 vigilance gate execute correctly. 'what's my name'/'what is my name' unchanged — those are user-name lookups, not identity questions.
body.description: Habit responses get no D072 vigilance check. Fix: route through _build_think_context or add vigilance inline. #220
